description: 11l I ferfcS z CONTINUING THE SAUK CENTRE NEv Pioneer and One of Citys Oldest Residents Called Jacob Botz Passed Away December 27 94 Years Old FUNERAL FRIDAY Anton Marthaler West Union Called Thursday Dec 21st One of Sauk Centres oldest resi dents and a pioneer of Stearns County Jacob Botz passed away Wednesday morning December 27 at 345 oclock Death came to him at 94 years of age and he was active until a few months ago when his health began to fail Homesteading the farm now owned by Alex Botz in the year of 1868 Mr Botz suffered all the hardships of early pioneers A sev ere fire destroyed his crops and buildings during the early years and a few years later the grass hoppers destroyed another crop Despite these early handicaps he was a successful farmer and he reaped the fruits of his labor for life during the reclining years Mr Botz was born in Koln Ger many on November 13 1845 and he came to America with his parents in 1850 The family located at Port Washington Wisconsin He came to Minnesota and Stearns county in 1867 and homesteaded on Sec tion 9 Town of Getty
